name: Samundar Ki Kari- Squid in Spinach-Tomato Curry - India
recipeIngredient: fresh ground black pepper -- to taste
1 tsp black or yellow mustard seeds
1 1/2 inches piece fresh ginger root, peeled and minced
1 1/4 lbs squid, cleaned and sliced (or scallops or prawns)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chili powder, turmeric, cumin, coriander, salt, black pepper, and 2 tablespoons water in a small bowl; mix.
2. Heat oil in a large non-stick frying pan over high heat. Add mustard seeds and let them pop for a few seconds.
3. Add garlic and ginger. Stir-fry until garlic turns light brown.
4. Add the spice paste. Stir-fry for 15 seconds.
5. Add tomatoes and spinach. Stir-fry for one minute.
6. Pour in water (1 cup) and bring to simmer. Simmer uncovered on low heat for 10 minutes.
7. Add squid, turn off high heat, and stir until the squid just turns opaque (this should take a short time).
8. Stir in coconut milk and let it simmer for half a minute before turning off the heat and serving.
